# Bear spotted in Chesterfield County backyards

**TL;DR:** Residents in Chesterfield County have reported a bear in residential areas.

A bear has been spotted in backyards across Chesterfield County. Wildlife in residential areas is not uncommon in the region, though sightings prompt reminders for residents to secure food sources and maintain distance from wildlife.

**Why it matters:** Bear sightings alert residents to take precautions with trash, pet food, and outdoor spaces to protect both themselves and wildlife.
